title: Badge
description: Inline label to show state, counts or categories. Supports solid / subtle / outline variants, semantic colors, sizes, icon and dot mode.

variants.title: Variants
variants.desc: Three visual treatments: solid for emphasis, subtle by default and outline for discretion.

icon.title: With icon
icon.desc: Add an icon to the left of the label to reinforce meaning.

dot.title: Dot mode
dot.desc: Replaces the icon with a dot to indicate presence or availability state.

props.label: Badge text. Equivalent to the default slot for plain content.
props.variant: Visual style applied to the badge.
props.color: Semantic color applied to the badge.
props.gradient: Applies a subtle gradient (only with solid variant).
props.size: Badge size. Cascades from ModoProvider when omitted.
props.icon: Icon component rendered to the left of the label.
props.removable: Shows a close button that emits the remove event.
props.dot: Replaces the icon with a small colored dot.
props.removeAriaLabel: Overrides the aria-label of the remove button.

emits.remove: Emitted when the close button is clicked while removable is active.

slots.default: Custom badge content. Replaces the label prop when HTML or inner components are needed.
